body.body: Build ~/.claude/skills/context-load/SKILL.md + helper script. Pattern: (1) read slate (5 lines, what is active); (2) slate entries point to relevant blobs; (3) fetch top N lines of each blob (newest-first = most relevant first); (4) assemble as briefing. No Igor required, no Postgres required — works on files or simple API. Blob format: prepend-only, newest at top, stop reading when context is sufficient. Blobs: decisions log, session notes, gap log, any per-ticket context. Same pattern as ring memory but for project coordination. Exportable to non-Igor projects. Replaces: reading CLAUDE.md + MEMORY.md + sessions.md + gap_analysis at session start. Also design the blob naming convention and slate format so any session can find relevant blobs without prior knowledge.
body.title: context-load skill — trail-based startup context from blob tops
body.result: SKILL.md built and live. Used successfully in sessions. Trail-based blob-top pattern works.
